hero.title: The Unified Gateway for LLMs
hero.subtitle: One API to access 250+ models from 8+ providers. Smart routing, built-in reliability, and enterprise-grade security.

features.title: Everything you need to manage LLMs

unifiedApi.title: One API for Any Model
unifiedApi.description: Access all major models through a single, unified interface. OpenAI SDK works out of the box.

smartRouting.title: Smart Routing
smartRouting.description: 4 routing modes: single, fallback, load-balance, and conditional. Intelligent model selection based on your rules.

reliability.title: Built-in Reliability
reliability.description: Auto-retry, semantic caching, circuit breaker, and rate limiting. Keep your applications running smoothly.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.description: 40+ guardrail rules, PII masking, RBAC permissions, and full audit logging. Protect your data and users.

providers.title: Supported Providers
providers.subtitle: Connect to the world's leading AI providers through a single gateway.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: Start building with WuguHub today. Free tier available.
